Functions and data structures for managing and serializing contact and address attributes in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[attributes_address.c](attributes_address.c.md)**: Functions for parsing, initializing, serializing, and deserializing address attributes in a contact list.
- **[attributes_address.h](attributes_address.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for handling and serializing address and attribute lists.
- **[contacts.c](contacts.c.md)**: Manages contact data deserialization and retrieval by UUID in the Pebble firmware.
- **[contacts.h](contacts.h.md)**: Defines a `Contact` structure and functions to manage contacts by UUID in the Pebble firmware.
